summary: Model leave as non-project work and rebuild the BI dashboard as a project input analysis workbench.

notes: Added projects.work_kind and normalized leave into the single LEAVE / leave system project.
Leave consumes personal timesheet capacity and routes through department-owner confirmation, but is excluded from project work-hour analytics.
Added project planned labor days and labor budget amount fields.
Added psa_dashboard_analysis(start_date, end_date, grain) to return project ranking, department split, employee load, trend, and source timesheet details from the database.
Replaced the temporary BI analysis page with a project input analysis workbench.
Added project budget inputs to project configuration.
Project picker now emphasizes project names and labels leave as non-project work.
Dashboard charts and source drill-down are driven by the new backend aggregation RPC.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.19.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.19.
Run scripts/assert-function-grants.sql on the cloud database.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.19.
known_warnings: Local psql is not installed on this workstation, so SQL asserts are run on the cloud database after deployment.
Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
